etymology.description: semantic 肉(肉) (ròu, "meat; flesh") + phonetic 由(由) (yóu) -> helmet
etymology.interpretation: The character 胄 (zhòu, "helmet") employs the semantic component 肉(肉) (ròu, "meat; flesh") to indicate protection for the head, akin to a casing over flesh, and uses 由(由) (yóu) for its phonetic property, connecting sound rather than contributing to meaning.
